summary: Completed testing of Pet Buddy Meetups feature. All 12 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed. Features verified: 1) Pet Buddy Meetups modal shows restaurant name and city in header, 2) Visit cards show user name, date, time slot, restaurant name, city, pets, notes, 3) Connect button works with loading state and 'Sent!' success feedback, 4) Schedule Visit tab has notification preference selection (Email/WhatsApp radio buttons), 5) Backend stores notification_preference when scheduling a visit, 6) Admin Dine Manager -> Meetup Requests tab loads correctly with stats, 7) Admin Meetup Requests shows Accept/Decline buttons for pending meetups.
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test visits and meetup requests with TEST_ prefix for testing purposes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet Buddy Meetups feature fully functional. Key endpoints: POST /api/dine/visits (with notification_preference field), POST /api/dine/meetup-request, GET /api/admin/dine/meetups, PUT /api/admin/dine/meetups/{id}/status. Frontend modal at DinePage.jsx shows restaurant name and city in header. Admin panel DineManager.jsx has Meetup Requests tab with Accept/Decline buttons for pending meetups.

backend_api_tests.test_get_restaurants_api: PASS - Returns restaurants with city field
backend_api_tests.test_schedule_visit_with_notification_pr: PASS - Visit scheduled with email preference stored
PASS - Visit scheduled with WhatsApp preference stored
backend_api_tests.test_visit_response_includes_restaurant_: PASS - Visit includes restaurant_name and restaurant_city
backend_api_tests.test_admin_get_meetups: PASS - Returns meetups with stats (total, pending, accepted, declined)
backend_api_tests.test_visit_model_has_notification_prefer: PASS - notification_preference field present in visit model

frontend_ui_tests.pet_buddy_modal_header: PASS - Shows 'Pet Buddy Meetups' title with restaurant name and city (e.g., 'TherPup Café • Bangalore')
frontend_ui_tests.visit_cards_content: PASS - Cards show date, time slot, restaurant name, city, and notes
frontend_ui_tests.connect_button_functionality: PASS - Button shows loading state then changes to 'Sent!' after successful request
frontend_ui_tests.notification_preference_radios: PASS - Email and WhatsApp radio buttons present in Schedule Visit form
frontend_ui_tests.schedule_visit_form_fields: PASS - Date input, Time slot select, Notes input, Looking for buddies checkbox all present
frontend_ui_tests.admin_dine_manager_tabs: PASS - Restaurants, Reservations, Pet Buddy Visits, Meetup Requests tabs all present
frontend_ui_tests.admin_meetup_requests_stats: PASS - Stats cards show Total Requests, Pending, Accepted, Declined counts
frontend_ui_tests.admin_meetup_accept_decline_buttons: PASS - Accept and Decline buttons visible for pending meetups

pet_buddy_modal_header.description: Modal header shows 'Pet Buddy Meetups' title with restaurant name and city separated by bullet (•)

visit_cards_display.description: Visit cards display: user name (if available), date, time slot badge, restaurant name, city, pets list, and notes

connect_button.description: Connect button shows loading spinner with 'Sending...' text, then changes to green 'Sent!' with checkmark after successful request

notification_preference.description: Schedule Visit form has notification preference section with Email and WhatsApp radio buttons. Default is 'email'. Backend stores this in notification_preference field.

admin_meetup_requests_tab.description: Admin panel Dine Manager has Meetup Requests tab showing stats (Total, Pending, Accepted, Declined), filter dropdown, and meetup cards with Accept/Decline/Cancel/Delete buttons based on status

screenshots: .screenshots/pet_buddy_modal.png - Shows modal with restaurant name and city in header
.screenshots/after_connect_click.png - Shows 'Sent!' button state after successful request
.screenshots/admin_dine_manager.png - Shows Dine Management section with tabs
.screenshots/admin_meetup_requests_final.png - Shows Meetup Requests tab with Accept/Decline buttons
